<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions\SolutionProviders; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\Laravel\DefaultDbNameSolutionProvider as BaseDefaultDbNameSolutionProviderAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; class DefaultDbNameSolutionProvider extends BaseDefaultDbNameSolutionProviderAlias implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { }
